name: abrose-plugins
description: Alfred Brose's personal Claude Code plugin collection.

plugins.name: adhd-explanatory-mode
plugins.description: SessionStart hook that reshapes explanatory output for an ADHD reader: lead with the action, number steps, restate state, make wins visible, cut preamble/closers. Toggle per session.

plugins.name: simplified-technical-english
plugins.description: SessionStart hook that writes all prose in Simplified Technical English (ASD-STE100): short sentences, active voice, imperative instructions, one meaning per word, consistent terms. Exempts code. Toggle per session.

plugins.name: adhd-friendly-simple-technical-english
plugins.description: Ships one output style combining Simplified Technical English (short, direct sentences) with an ADHD-friendly, action-first shape, and keeps the teaching insight blocks. Select it from /config.
